result.stdout:
kafka-context (dotnet tool)

Usage:
  kafka-context schema scaffold --subject <subject> [options]
  kafka-context schema verify   --subject <subject> [--type <assembly-qualified-type> | --fingerprint <hex>] [options]
  kafka-context schema subjects [options]
  kafka-context streaming flink with-preview [options]
  kafka-context ai guide [--rules] [--copy]

Options (shared):
  --sr-url <url>       Schema Registry URL (or env KAFKA_CONTEXT_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL)

Options (scaffold):
  --output <dir>       Output directory (default: ./)
  --namespace <ns>     Generated namespace (default: Kafka.Context.Generated)
  --style <record|class>  Generated type style (default: record)
  --topic <topic>      Override topic name (default: derived from subject)
  --force              Overwrite existing files
  --dry-run            Print generated code to stdout (no file write)

Options (verify):
  --type <type>        Assembly-qualified type name (optional)
  --fingerprint <hex>  Expected fingerprint (optional)

Options (subjects):
  --prefix <prefix>    Filter subjects by prefix
  --contains <text>    Filter subjects by substring
  --json               Output JSON array

Options (streaming flink with-preview):
  --config <path>      appsettings.json path (default: ./appsettings.json)
  --topic <name>       Only show a single topic (optional)
  --kind <all|source|sink>  Filter by kind (default: all)
  --assembly <path[,path]>  Assembly path(s) to load POCOs for column DDL
  --allow-missing-types  Allow topics without matching POCOs (fallback to skeleton)
  --json               Output JSON

Options (ai guide):
  --rules              Output conversation rules instead of the main guide
  --copy               Copy the output to the clipboard (best-effort)

kafka-context (dotnet tool)

Usage:
  kafka-context schema scaffold --subject <subject> [options]
  kafka-context schema verify   --subject <subject> [--type <assembly-qualified-type> | --fingerprint <hex>] [options]
  kafka-context schema subjects [options]
  kafka-context streaming flink with-preview [options]
  kafka-context ai guide [--rules] [--copy]

Options (shared):
  --sr-url <url>       Schema Registry URL (or env KAFKA_CONTEXT_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL)

Options (scaffold):
  --output <dir>       Output directory (default: ./)
  --namespace <ns>     Generated namespace (default: Kafka.Context.Generated)
  --style <record|class>  Generated type style (default: record)
  --topic <topic>      Override topic name (default: derived from subject)
  --force              Overwrite existing files
  --dry-run            Print generated code to stdout (no file write)

Options (verify):
  --type <type>        Assembly-qualified type name (optional)
  --fingerprint <hex>  Expected fingerprint (optional)

Options (subjects):
  --prefix <prefix>    Filter subjects by prefix
  --contains <text>    Filter subjects by substring
  --json               Output JSON array

Options (streaming flink with-preview):
  --config <path>      appsettings.json path (default: ./appsettings.json)
  --topic <name>       Only show a single topic (optional)
  --kind <all|source|sink>  Filter by kind (default: all)
  --assembly <path[,path]>  Assembly path(s) to load POCOs for column DDL
  --allow-missing-types  Allow topics without matching POCOs (fallback to skeleton)

Options (ai guide):
